title: Verify complete source reconciliation
preconditions: Qualified fixtures and mutations with omitted, duplicated, sign-inverted, control-mismatched, and unexplained records are available.
steps: Preview each source and injected mutation, verify row accounting, opening and closing equations, and running-balance transitions where supplied.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-SOURCE-RECONCILIATION holds; all qualified fixtures reconcile and every corrupted case stays unapproved and uncommittable.
